demographic_audit_note: Audited Atlantis demographics for Martha G. (83yo); identified a critical address discrepancy where Atlantis listed her 3rd-floor apartment, but the facility face sheet indicates she will be discharging to her daughter's ranch-style home. Insurance verified as BlueCare Plus (Medicare Advantage).
home_vs_ltc_determination: Social Worker confirmed the discharge goal is Home with the daughter providing 24/7 support initially.
weekly_facility_update: Week 2 Check-in: Martha is weaning off high-flow oxygen; however, the SW reports the preferred HHA (HomeCare West) is out-of-network for Martha's Advantage plan, delaying the referral process.
v_card_and_flyer_status: V-Card successfully inserted into Martha's iPhone; program flyer delivered to Martha and her daughter during the Stage 2 education session.
pre_dc_pulse_call_result: Conducted 24-hour pulse call; reached Martha's daughter. Confirmed the oxygen concentrator was delivered to the home and the daughter is comfortable with the 10:00 AM first-visit window tomorrow.
atlantis_final_sync: Entered confirmed D/C date of 11/14 and scheduled 1st visit date of 11/15 into the Atlantis portal.
ma_visit_booking: Medical Assistant (MA) scheduled for the first visit on 11/15 at 10:00 AM, within the mandatory 24-hour post-discharge window.
narrative_summary: Martha, an 83-year-old recovering from post-ICU pneumonia, was tracked through the Atlantis system with a clear home-discharge goal. A significant administrative barrier arose during Stage 2 when her Medicare Advantage plan was found to be out-of-network for the facility's primary HHA, requiring the PN to flag the mismatch for the SW. Following a successful transition to an in-network agency, the PN conducted a 24-hour pulse call to confirm home readiness and successfully scheduled the MA for the first visit to trigger the incentive.

format_1_state_log.event_description: Discovery of Insurance-HHA Network Mismatch during demographic audit.
format_1_state_log.bottleneck_detail: Discovery of Insurance-HHA Network Mismatch during demographic audit.

format_1_state_log.event_description: PN verifies daughter's home address for DME delivery and MA travel routing.
format_1_state_log.bottleneck_detail: PN verifies daughter's home address for DME delivery and MA travel routing.

format_1_state_log.event_description: HHA intake coordinator confirms new in-network referral receipt.
format_1_state_log.bottleneck_detail: HHA intake coordinator confirms new in-network referral receipt.

format_2_triples.situation: Atlantis demographics show Martha's old apartment address which lacks wheelchair access.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Audited facility face sheet and updated Atlantis with the daughter's ranch-style home address.
format_2_triples.intent_detail: Verifying logistics and data accuracy: Audited facility face sheet and updated Atlantis with the daughter's ranch-style home address.

format_2_triples.situation: Martha's daughter expressed fear about managing the oxygen concentrator at home.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Walked the daughter through the Day 1 expectations, including who to call if the equipment fails.
format_2_triples.intent_detail: Educating on program expectations: Walked the daughter through the Day 1 expectations, including who to call if the equipment fails.

format_2_triples.situation: The SW's first choice for HHA was out-of-network for BlueCare Plus.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Escalated the insurance mismatch to the SW and confirmed the Hub received the updated insurance data.
format_2_triples.intent_detail: Escalating to SW for resolution: Escalated the insurance mismatch to the SW and confirmed the Hub received the updated insurance data.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Defer the insurance network resolution entirely to the Social Worker and wait for the new agency assignment to appear in the facility EMR.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: This follows the SW Boundary rule by letting the SW handle agency selection and referrals without PN interference.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Audit Martha's insurance ID in Atlantis against the facility face sheet and flag the network mismatch to the SW while Martha is still clinically stabilizing.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: This aligns with Stage 1/2 checklist items for eligibility verification and data harvesting without overstepping into agency selection.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Call BlueCare Plus directly to advocate for a single-case agreement for Martha's preferred HHA to ensure she can discharge on her original target date.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: This is a banned action as the PN is strictly prohibited from calling insurance companies for authorization or handling HHA contracting.
